top_signals.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
top_signals.summary: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Japan’s bond market is back in play after decades in the wilderness
top_signals.summary: JGBs have been selling off amid policy normalization and concerns over Tokyo's spending plans, but experts say that they deserve another look from investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Fighter jet maker Saab smashes expectations as CEO urges procurement rethink
top_signals.summary: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.
